result.summary: The Sudan conflict has led to a dire situation, with ongoing civil war between the army and paramilitary forces causing devastating effects on civilians and infrastructure.
result.reasoning: The articles highlight the escalating violence against healthcare, drone strikes on hospitals, and the impact on the country's healthcare system, indicating a medium-level risk of further instability.

signals.text: Paramilitary forces kill at least 10 people in hospital drone attack

best.description: Ongoing conflict subsides, and a peaceful resolution is reached

likely.description: Conflict escalates further, with increased violence against civilians and infrastructure

worst.description: Total collapse of the government, leading to widespread chaos and instability

sources.name: gnews
sources.title: Sudan Army Conducts Airstrike, 56 Dead and 107 Injured
